raw_data.content:
# ⚡ POWER HOUR — HOW IT WORKS

A random event that rolls **every hour** — **10% chance** between 13:00–21:00 UTC, **5% chance** all other hours.
When it fires, it lasts **exactly 1 hour** — then points are calculated and awarded.

## ⚡⚡ Double Power Hour
Every Power Hour has a **50% chance** to become a **Double Power Hour**, where all Wave Points earned are **2×**!
Watch the announcement — the start embed will show `⚡⚡ DOUBLE POWER HOUR` if you're in luck.

## 🌊 How to Earn Wave Points
📨 **Messages** — every **10 messages** sent in either server → **+1 Wave Point**
👤 **Role Duties** — every **5 roles given** → **+1 Wave Point**
🗺️ **Map Requests** — every **1 request** completed → **+1 Wave Point**
🛡️ **Mod Commands** — every **2 mod commands** used → **+1 Wave Point**
*(All values above are **doubled** during a Double Power Hour)*

## ⏰ When Are Points Awarded?
All points are calculated and awarded **at the end of the hour** in one go.
You will NOT receive them mid-event — keep grinding until time is up!

## 🎲 How Does It Trigger?
Every hour at :00, the bot rolls for a chance to start.
**Peak hours (13:00–21:00 UTC):** `10%` chance — **Off-peak:** `5%` chance
If triggered, there is then a **50% chance** it becomes a **Double Power Hour** (2× points).
Each hour is completely independent — missing one roll has no effect on the next.
Watch this channel for the roll result every hour and for the ⚡ event announcement.

## 📡 Active Servers
Activity is tracked across **Wave Free Dropmaps!** & **Wave Improvement Cord! | Loot Routes + Tips & Tricks** simultaneously.
It does not matter which server you are active in — both count equally.

## ⚠️ Penalties
Spamming or cheating will get you disqualified instantly and possibly removed from staff.

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s
